findings.remediation: Require explicit approval and sandbox shell execution.
findings.title: Shell execution is enabled

findings.evidence: Filesystem roots include broad or unrestricted paths
findings.remediation: Constrain file access to project-scoped allowlists.
findings.title: Broad filesystem access

findings.evidence: Browser config permits LAN/localhost/private network access
findings.remediation: Block private network ranges unless explicitly needed.
findings.title: Browser can reach private network

findings.evidence: Untrusted content, private data, and outbound action all appear enabled
findings.remediation: Break at least one leg with isolation, deny-by-default tools, or approval gates.
findings.title: Lethal trifecta present

findings.evidence: Approvals config disables one or more high-risk action gates
findings.remediation: Require human approval for sends, shell, deletes, trades, purchases, and force-pushes.
findings.title: Approval gate disabled for dangerous action

findings.remediation: Use stronger models for adversarial routing or add stricter tool gates.
findings.title: Model may be weaker against prompt injection

recommended_next_actions: Require explicit approval and sandbox shell execution.
Constrain file access to project-scoped allowlists.
Block private network ranges unless explicitly needed.
Break at least one leg with isolation, deny-by-default tools, or approval gates.
Require human approval for sends, shell, deletes, trades, purchases, and force-pushes.
